title: Palo Alto Networks warns of critical PAN-OS zero-day under active exploitation
summary: Attackers are exploiting CVE-2024-3400, a command injection flaw in the GlobalProtect feature of PAN-OS firewalls, to deploy a Python backdoor. Observed C2 traffic to 193.34.214.83.

title: CISA adds Palo Alto PAN-OS command injection bug to KEV catalog
summary: CVE-2024-3400 has been added to the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog. Federal agencies must patch the PAN-OS GlobalProtect vulnerability immediately.

title: State-linked actors weaponise Palo Alto firewall flaw to breach networks
summary: Researchers attribute exploitation of the PAN-OS vulnerability CVE-2024-3400 to a sophisticated threat cluster. Payload hash 5b3f0c1d9e7a2b4c6f8e0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0c1d.

title: Clop ransomware gang exploits MOVEit Transfer zero-day in mass data theft
summary: The Clop ransomware group is behind mass exploitation of CVE-2023-34362, a SQL injection flaw in Progress MOVEit Transfer, stealing data from hundreds of organisations.

title: MOVEit breach victim count climbs past 600 organisations
summary: The fallout from the MOVEit Transfer vulnerability CVE-2023-34362 continues to grow, with newly disclosed victims across finance, healthcare and government.

title: CitrixBleed: NetScaler flaw exploited to hijack user sessions
summary: CVE-2023-4966, dubbed CitrixBleed, lets attackers steal session tokens from NetScaler ADC and Gateway appliances, bypassing MFA. Exploit traffic seen from 45.142.212.61.

title: Ransomware groups pile onto CitrixBleed as exploitation surges
summary: Multiple ransomware affiliates are leveraging the Citrix NetScaler vulnerability CVE-2023-4966 for initial access, CISA warns in a joint advisory.

title: Ivanti Connect Secure VPN zero-days chained for unauthenticated RCE
summary: Two Ivanti vulnerabilities, CVE-2023-46805 and CVE-2024-21887, are being chained by suspected nation-state actors to achieve remote code execution on VPN appliances.

title: Thousands of Ivanti VPN appliances remain unpatched as attacks widen
summary: Scanning shows widespread exploitation of the Ivanti Connect Secure flaws. Malicious domain update.ivanti-security[.]help observed serving web shells.

title: LockBit ransomware affiliate arrested in international law enforcement operation
summary: Operation Cronos disrupted the LockBit ransomware-as-a-service operation, seizing infrastructure and decryption keys after months of coordinated effort.

title: Phishing campaign abuses Microsoft 365 to harvest corporate credentials
summary: A large-scale phishing campaign is using adversary-in-the-middle techniques to bypass MFA and steal Microsoft 365 session cookies from enterprise users.

title: Healthcare provider discloses data breach affecting 2.3 million patients
summary: A US healthcare network confirmed that attackers exfiltrated patient records following an intrusion. The threat actor demanded a ransom to prevent publication.

title: Cisco IOS XE web UI implant infects tens of thousands of devices
summary: Mass exploitation of CVE-2023-20198 in Cisco IOS XE has led to widespread deployment of a malicious implant granting attackers full device control.

title: New malware loader distributed through malicious search engine adverts
summary: A malvertising campaign is delivering a stealthy loader that drops infostealers. The loader beacons to command-and-control server 91.92.250.104 over HTTPS.

title: Critical Confluence flaw exploited days after disclosure
summary: Attackers are actively exploiting CVE-2023-22515 in Atlassian Confluence Data Center to create rogue administrator accounts on internet-facing servers.

title: Fortinet FortiOS heap overflow exploited in attacks on government targets
summary: CVE-2023-27997, a heap-based buffer overflow in FortiOS SSL-VPN, is being used to compromise government and critical infrastructure networks.

title: Apache Log4j flaw still exploited two years after Log4Shell disclosure
summary: Despite patches being available since 2021, CVE-2021-44228 (Log4Shell) continues to be one of the most exploited vulnerabilities targeting unpatched Java applications.

title: Threat actors abuse WinRAR vulnerability to target traders
summary: CVE-2023-38831 in WinRAR is being exploited to deliver malware to cryptocurrency and stock trading forums, researchers report.

title: ConnectWise ScreenConnect flaw triggers emergency patching scramble
summary: CVE-2024-1709, a maximum-severity authentication bypass in ConnectWise ScreenConnect, is being mass-exploited to deploy ransomware and remote access tools.

title: DDoS attack disrupts European banking services for several hours
summary: A distributed denial-of-service attack briefly took several European banks offline. A pro-hacktivist group claimed responsibility on Telegram.

title: Supply-chain attack pushes trojanised updates to enterprise software users
summary: Attackers compromised a software vendor's update mechanism to distribute a backdoor, echoing previous high-profile supply-chain incidents.

title: Microsoft patches actively exploited Windows SmartScreen bypass
summary: February's Patch Tuesday addresses CVE-2024-21412, a SmartScreen security feature bypass already used in financially motivated attacks.

title: Zero-day broker prices for mobile exploits hit record highs
summary: The market for zero-day exploits continues to expand, with brokers offering seven-figure sums for full-chain mobile remote code execution.

title: GitLab urges immediate patching of account takeover vulnerability
summary: CVE-2023-7028 allows attackers to trigger password-reset emails to attacker-controlled addresses, enabling account takeover without interaction.

title: Backdoor discovered in xz Utils threatens Linux supply chain
summary: A malicious backdoor tracked as CVE-2024-3094 was planted in the xz Utils compression library, nearly compromising countless Linux distributions before discovery.

title: Researchers detail xz Utils supply-chain backdoor and its near miss
summary: Analysis of CVE-2024-3094 reveals a patient, multi-year social-engineering effort to insert a backdoor into widely used open-source code.

title: Jenkins arbitrary file read flaw under active scanning
summary: CVE-2024-23897 in the Jenkins automation server allows attackers to read arbitrary files; mass internet scanning for vulnerable servers has begun.

title: Champions League semi-final ends in dramatic penalty shootout
summary: An extraordinary night of football saw the tie decided on penalties after a 2-2 draw across both legs.

title: Stock markets rally as central bank signals interest rate pause
summary: Equities climbed across major indices after policymakers indicated that rate hikes may be coming to an end.

title: Award-winning film sweeps the board at this year's ceremony
summary: The historical drama took home seven awards including best picture and best director at a star-studded ceremony.

title: Scientists discover new species of deep-sea coral off the coast
summary: Researchers exploring an underwater canyon have catalogued a vibrant new coral species at record depths.

title: Five easy weeknight pasta recipes for busy families
summary: From classic carbonara to a quick puttanesca, these recipes get a satisfying dinner on the table in under thirty minutes.

title: Heatwave expected to break temperature records across the region
summary: Forecasters warn of an incoming heatwave with temperatures climbing well above seasonal averages this week.

title: Tech giant unveils new flagship smartphone with improved camera
summary: The latest handset features a redesigned camera system, a brighter display and a faster processor, the company announced.

title: Marathon world record broken at major city event
summary: A stunning run saw the course record shattered as elite athletes battled cool conditions and an enthusiastic crowd.

title: New art exhibition celebrates a century of modern design
summary: The retrospective brings together furniture, posters and product design spanning a hundred years of creative innovation.

title: Electric vehicle sales surpass expectations in the first quarter
summary: Quarterly figures show electric vehicle adoption accelerating faster than analysts had forecast, driven by new budget models.

title: Local council approves plans for new community park and cycle paths
summary: The development will add green space, a playground and several kilometres of cycle routes to the neighbourhood.

title: Chef's new cookbook focuses on seasonal vegetarian cooking
summary: The collection of plant-forward recipes emphasises local, seasonal produce and simple techniques for home cooks.

title: Travel guide names top ten destinations for autumn getaways
summary: From mountain retreats to coastal towns, this year's list highlights places to visit as the seasons turn.
